title: Modes, Padding, Malleability, and Legacy Decryption · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Encrypt Then Mac
summary: A database encrypts records with ECB, a migration endpoint exposes CBC padding failures, and a CTR counter can repeat after restoring a snapshot. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the encrypt then mac increment in mode failure laboratory and migration adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: For unavoidable legacy modes, authenticate versioned context and ciphertext before decryption with independent keys and uniform failures.
Trace CTR keystream generation and prove that key-counter reuse destroys confidentiality and enables malleation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Encrypt Then Mac · Theory Crypto Go Encrypt Then Mac
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 2109 during a backup restoration drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ECB and unauthenticated modes while containing CBC or CTR to uniform decrypt-only migration; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then repeat or roll back a nonce, sequence, or key version and reject the stale state. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Encrypt Then Mac contract for the supplied data.
